key: Can I speak to the manager?
text: Can I speak to the manager?

Hi, you have reached Elaine Pinho. I am sorry I cannot take your call right now. Please leave your name, your number, and a short message after the beep, and I will call you back soon. Thank you, and have a great day. Beep.

Thank you for calling the Grand Hotel. Your call is important to us. All of our lines are busy at the moment. Please hold on, and the next person will speak to you soon. To leave a message, please press one. To speak to the front desk, please stay on the line. Thank you for waiting.

key: Hello, front desk. How can I help you?
text: Hello, front desk. How can I help you?

key: Hello, this is Elaine in room 305. Can I speak to the manager?
text: Hello, this is Elaine in room 305. Can I speak to the manager?

key: I am sorry, the manager is busy right now.
text: I am sorry, the manager is busy right now.

key: Oh, okay. Could you take a message?
text: Oh, okay. Could you take a message?

key: Of course. Please hold on one moment.
text: Of course. Please hold on one moment.

key: Thank you. Please tell him the air conditioning is broken.
text: Thank you. Please tell him the air conditioning is broken.

key: No problem. What is your phone number?
text: No problem. What is your phone number?

key: It is five, five, five, one, two, three, four.
text: It is five, five, five, one, two, three, four.

key: Got it. He will call you back soon.
text: Got it. He will call you back soon.

key: Sorry, I think you have the wrong number.
text: Sorry, I think you have the wrong number.

Elaine wants to call the front desk. She picks up the phone and dials the number. The phone rings and a person answers. Elaine says hello and asks to speak to the manager. The manager is busy, so Elaine leaves a message.
